stemHtml: According to SERA (Standardised European Rules of the Air), what are the regulations concerning the use psychoactive substances such as alcohol by flight crew?

options.a: SERA doesn’t consider this and it is the operator’s decision.
options.b: Flight crew may not engage at all on or off duty.
options.c: Flight crew may engage in non-problematic psychoactive substances but not 8 hours before a safety-critical role.
options.d: Flight crew should not be behind the controls when under the influence of psychoactive substances or when human performance is impaired.
